arts.ttl: Who is Chris Rigg? The Sunderland sensation wanted by Real Madrid, Man Utd, and Liverpool
arts.sum: "Chris Rigg is a good symbol of what we want to create and what we want to build as a team and as a club," said Le Bris after Rigg scored a fabulous backheel goal in a 1-0 win over Middlesbrough. The Sunderland sensation wanted by Real Madrid, Man Utd, and Liverpool

arts.ttl: Man Utd former assistant reveals details of Erik ten Hag & Cristiano Ronaldo bust-up
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag's former assistant manager Steve McClaren has revealed the story behind Cristiano Ronaldo's decision to leave Manchester United, claiming that the Dutchman handled the situation in the right way. But, Ten Hag's former right-hand man McClaren believes he reacted in the best possible way, admitting that the Dutchman did what was 'needed'.

arts.ttl: I saw what Erik ten Hag did for Cristiano Ronaldo and Kobbie Mainoo - previous managers couldn't
arts.sum: Manchester United icon Cristiano Ronaldo and Erik ten Hag did not see eye-to-eye during his second spell at Old Trafford between 2021 and 2022

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba and Bruno Fernandes send Raphael Varane emotional Man United messages
arts.sum: Former Manchester United defender Raphael Varane announced his retirement from professional football on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Joshua Zirkzee names four players who have helped him settle in at Manchester United
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee was one of five signings drafted in by Man United during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: INEOS-owned OGC Nice barred from making contact with Manchester United owners
arts.sum: INEOS-owned OGC Nice have been barred from making contact with Manchester United owners to comply with UEFA rules regarding multi-club ownership, according to L’Equipe. Both Nice and Manchester United will…

arts.ttl: What's Phil Jones Doing Since Leaving Man Utd?
arts.sum: Jones was brought in to be a stalwart at the heart of the Manchester United defence for the next decade, but that didn't quite go to plan...

arts.ttl: Manchester United add seven players to their squad for Europa League fixture vs FC Twente
arts.sum: Man United will get their Europa League campaign up and running when they face FC Twente at Old Trafford on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs FC Twente – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: European football returns to Old Trafford on Wednesday evening following a year-long hiatus, as Manchester United commence their Europa League campaign by welcoming Eredivisie outfit FC Twente. The Red Devils booked their spot in the prestigious competition after beating local rivals Manchester City in the FA Cup final despite not qualifying through the league standings. […] The post Manchester United vs FC Twente – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Manchester United need to do something they have not done for four years vs FC Twente
arts.sum: Man United will be determined to make a winning start to their Europa League campaign on Wednesday evening.
